/admin/content/files.reason: No route, no alias, no redirect, and no view display at this path; no routes exist under the /admin/content/files prefix. Technically unclaimed. Note it lives in the /admin/content/ administrative namespace, so it is an unusual/ill-advised place for a content node alias, but nothing currently claims the exact path.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: No route, no alias, no redirect, and no view at this exact path. Routes under /admin/content/media/ are bulk-upload, bulk-upload/{media_type}, and the media collection at /admin/content/media; none match /scheduled. Scheduler's scheduled-content view is at /admin/content/scheduled (different path). Unclaimed, though it sits in the /admin namespace.

/blog.reason: Already claimed by a path alias: /blog -> /page/2, which resolves to route entity.canvas_page.canonical (an existing Canvas page node). Using it as a new node's alias would collide. (Separately, /blog/feed is an RSS view, but the conflict is the /blog alias itself.)

/moderated-content.reason: No alias, no route, no redirect, and not a view path. The Content Moderation 'Moderated content' view is at /admin/content/moderated (different path), so /moderated-content is unclaimed.

/search.reason: Claimed by the core 'search' view page display (route view.search.page, view search:page) bound to path /search.

/this-is-free-xyz.reason: No path alias, no route (router.no_access_checks throws ResourceNotFoundException), no view display path, and no redirect entity claims it. Free to use as a node alias.
